  ...

type Data.Functor.Classes.Eq1 :: (* -> *) -> Constraint

  ...
type Data.Functor.Classes.Eq2 :: (* -> * -> *) -> Constraint

      Data.Functor.Classes.Eq2 f
  ...
type Data.Functor.Classes.Ord1 :: (* -> *) -> Constraint
class (Data.Functor.Classes.Eq1 f, forall a. Ord a => Ord (f a)) =>
      Data.Functor.Classes.Ord1 f
  ...
type Data.Functor.Classes.Ord2 :: (* -> * -> *) -> Constraint

       forall a. Ord a => Data.Functor.Classes.Ord1 (f a)) =>
      Data.Functor.Classes.Ord2 f
  ...

      Data.Functor.Classes.Read1 f
  ...

      Data.Functor.Classes.Read2 f
  ...

      Data.Functor.Classes.Show1 f
  ...

      Data.Functor.Classes.Show2 f
  ...
